name: Mcllwain School Bus Line Inc
fmcsa_status: ACTIVE (not authorized for interstate for-hire; intrastate operations)
officers: Timothy D. McIlwain (Vice President; current President per recent sources)
registry_source: Company history (mcilwainbus.com About Us) confirms 1954 incorporation; PA Department of State business entity not directly retrieved
notes: Name in source list ('Mcllwain') is a misspelling of McIlwain. Address and city match exactly. Family-owned third-generation school bus operator. Power units (186) and drivers (203) per SAFER; company website notes 300+ vehicles fleet-wide across multiple PA locations (Johnstown HQ plus Berlin, Somerset, Cresson, Mt. Airy). USDOT 1247930 is the legal entity Mcilwain School Bus Lines Inc; an affiliated entity 'McIlwain Charters Inc' has USDOT 251223.

name: Transportation Resources Inc
fmcsa_status: ACTIVE (not authorized for interstate for-hire; intrastate non-hazmat)
registry_source: Ohio Secretary of State entity not directly retrieved; Yellowpages lists business as CLOSED but FMCSA shows active intrastate registration
notes: Legal FMCSA name is 'TRANSPORTATION RESOURCES OF COLUMBUS' (USDOT 2163866) matching exact street address 1120 Rarig Ave Columbus OH 43219. Slight name variance from input 'Transportation Resources Inc' but address match is exact. MCS-150 last updated 06/15/2011 (stale registration). Small fleet (7 power units, 8 drivers). Yellowpages indicates business may be closed; status uncertain operationally. Ohio SoS business entity search would confirm incorporation date and officers but was not accessible in this session.

name: Yellow Bird Co Inc
carrier_operation: Interstate; Private Passenger (Non-business); school bus and charter
registry_source: PA Department of State (Domestic Business Corporation, incorporation date 4/20/1981) per third-party aggregation of PA filings
notes: Legal FMCSA name 'YELLOWBIRD BUS CO INC'; input 'Yellow Bird Co Inc' is a slight variation. Address 7700 State Rd, Philadelphia PA 19136 matches exactly. Family-owned (Hicks family) school bus contractor serving Philadelphia, Bucks, Montgomery counties. Member of PA School Bus Association and NAPT. Fleet grew from 13 buses at founding to 109 per company website (FMCSA reports 54 power units, possibly only PA-registered subset).

name: Jubb's Bus Svc
registry_source: Maryland SDAT incorporation 1994 per company About Us page and aggregated business records; SDAT business entity search not directly retrieved
notes: Legal FMCSA name 'JUBB'S BUS SERVICE INC' matches input. Address 203 Holsum Way Glen Burnie MD 21060 matches exactly. Family-owned (Jubb family); founded 1927 by Eckhardt/William Eckhardt Jubb purchasing first school bus in Anne Arundel County; formally incorporated 1994. Serves Anne Arundel and Howard counties. Notable for operating Maryland's first propane autogas school bus (2015). Safety rating is older (2012) but carrier shows 158 inspections / 0 OOS over 24 months indicating active operations.

name: Peter Brega Inc
carrier_operation: Interstate; authorized for-hire passenger and school bus
inc_date: 1939 (operating since); NY corporate filing date not directly retrieved
officers: Brega family (independently owned and operated since founding)
registry_source: NY Department of State (Division of Corporations) entity not directly retrieved due to CAPTCHA on OpenCorporates mirror; company self-reports 'Since 1939' founding. Related Brega-family entities at same area: Brega D.O.T. Maintenance Corp. (DOS Doc 2169538, filed 1997-08-07); Brega Company LLC (DOS Doc 4028767, filed 2010-12-09); Brega Commercial Collision Corp. (DOS Doc 4712409, filed 2015-02-18).
notes: Legal FMCSA name 'PETER BREGA INCORPORATED' matches input 'Peter Brega Inc'. Address 500 Kings Highway Valley Cottage NY 10989 matches exactly. Family-owned (Brega family, Jason Brega is CEO of affiliated entities). Founded 1939; FMCSA operating authority (MC 168482) effective 09/20/1983. Provides school bus service to Nanuet, Nyack, South Orangetown school districts plus private/parochial schools, plus charter services. Active SBA PPP loan recipient in 2020 ($400K).
